create.title: New Ticket Created
create.description: A staff member will be with you shortly. Please describe your issue in detail.
create.claimed: This ticket has been claimed by {staff}.
create.assigned: This ticket has been assigned to {staff}.
create.already_open: You already have an open ticket: {channel}
create.cooldown: You must wait {seconds} seconds before opening another ticket.
create.max_reached: You have reached the maximum of {max} open tickets.
create.locked: This ticket has been locked by {staff}.
create.unlocked: This ticket has been unlocked by {staff}.
create.duplicate_warning:
⚠️ You may already have a similar open ticket: {channel}

Would you like to continue creating a new one, or go to your existing ticket?

close.confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to close this ticket?
close.reason_prompt: Please provide a reason for closing this ticket.
close.transcript_sent: A transcript has been sent to your DMs.
close.rating_prompt: How would you rate your support experience?

errors.no_permission: 🔒 **Permission Denied** — You do not have permission to do this.
errors.not_in_ticket: This command can only be used inside a ticket channel.
errors.cooldown: Please wait {seconds}s before using this command again.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

claim.already_claimed: This ticket is already claimed by {staff}.

shift.on_desc: {staff} is now **on duty** and accepting tickets.

verify.gate_desc: You must verify yourself before opening a ticket.
verify.success: ✅ You are now verified! You can open a ticket.
